class.name: naoqi_driver/AlMotionSystem
class.description: ros2_control system driving NAO/Pepper joints through NAOqi's high-level ALMotion service over libqi. Universal fallback (NAOqi 2.1 to 2.9), position command only. Required path on Pepper 2.9.

class.name: naoqi_driver/DcmSystem
class.description: ros2_control system driving NAO/Pepper joints through NAOqi's DCM over libqi (NAO 2.1 / Pepper 2.5). Position + stiffness; velocity if the per-joint speed key is provided via the velocity_actuator_key parameter.
